hero.title:
We build marketing
that sets you free
hero.description: We live and breathe what we do. We test every technique on ourselves before we ever recommend it to you.
hero.placeholder: Waiting for photos from the photographer :)
about.title: We practice what we preach
team.kacper.name: Kacper
team.kacper.bio: I first encountered machine learning at university — back when AI wasn't really a thing yet. Since then, I've spent hundreds of hours learning how to harness it and get Google to rank websites on the first page. My favourite moment? When an automation I've built just works. That's when I feel the touch of perfection.
team.agata.name: Agata
team.agata.bio: I started doing marketing at the companies I worked for — it began as a hobby. Along the way, I discovered I have a gift for creating content people actually want to read. I listen, then I craft stories that build genuine connection and authority. I design campaigns that turn strangers into brand advocates.
team.pomelo.name: POMELO
team.pomelo.bio: We joined forces and POMELO was born. In marriage and in business, time is the most precious thing. Online visibility takes years to build. Growing brand recognition, increasing sales, and streamlining your business processes — that's the key to freedom. You deserve great marketing and proven automations. Every minute is gone the moment it passes.
tools.title: Free tools for your business!
tools.subtitle: Run a professional, free analysis of your website or online store and get a full report on your online presence. No strings attached.
tool1.name: Mini SEO/GEO Audit
tool1.desc: Find out how visible your website really is. Is it showing up in ChatGPT and Gemini? You'll receive a detailed report with specific, actionable recommendations.
tool2.name: Social Media Potential Calculator
tool2.desc: See how much your business could gain from better online visibility. Find out what you're losing without a professional social media presence. Our interactive calculator puts the numbers in front of you.
tool3.name: Automation Readiness Test
tool3.desc: Take a quick survey to find out if your business is ready for automation. You'll receive a map of automation opportunities and a short implementation plan.
process.title: How we work. Step by step.
step1.title: MINI AUDIT
step1.subtitle: Our tools check your online presence for free
step1.desc: A quick analysis of your website, social media, and processes. No commitment, no contracts. Pick a free tool, enter your email, and results land in your inbox within minutes. This is your starting point for step 2.
step2.title: FULL REPORT
step2.subtitle: In-depth analysis and strategy
step2.desc: Order and receive a detailed report with recommendations and an action plan tailored to what you want to improve or build. Every report is created by us using expert knowledge and analytics tools. Delivery within 7 days. Time for step 3.
step3.title: CONSULTATION
step3.subtitle: We review the results and plan next steps
step3.desc: Once you have the report, you decide whether to go ahead with improvements or not. Together we set priorities, budget, and a timeline. Calls typically run 30 to 60 minutes — online, by phone, or in person.
step4.title: MONTHLY PACKAGE
step4.subtitle: We implement and monitor
step4.desc: Welcome to the inner circle of online marketing excellence. Regular, ongoing work on your marketing. You see consistent results in clear reports — we handle the rest. We protect your reputation, grow your visibility, and fine-tune your processes to drive more sales. Cancel any time.
reports.title: Ready-made reports and audits
reports.subtitle: Get a detailed analysis within 7 days. Order a report packed with key metrics, an action plan, statistics, analytics, and a picture of your closest competitors.
report1.title: SEO & GEO Report
report1.subtitle: Comprehensive analysis
report1.desc: You have a website, but no one's finding it? You'll get a detailed analysis with a list of issues, keyword recommendations, and a 30-day action plan. We'll analyse your closest competitors and identify the words and content that AI and Google love.
report1.lowest_price: Lowest price in the last 30 days: 149 zł (~$37)
report2.title: Social Media Audit
report2.subtitle: Potential analysis
report2.desc: You know social media is a goldmine of customers, but you don't know where to start? The audit will show you what's working, what isn't, and how to fix it. Whether you're already active on social media or starting from scratch.
report2.lowest_price: Lowest price in the last 30 days: 199 zł (~$50)
report3.title: Automation Report
report3.subtitle: Map of savings
report3.desc: Automation and AI are now standard practice in most large companies. Spending hours on repetitive tasks? You'll receive a map of processes ready for automation, complete with time and cost savings calculations.
report3.lowest_price: Lowest price in the last 30 days: 299 zł (~$75)

packages.title: Choose the package that fits your needs
package1.name: INVISIBLE
package1.problem: You have a website, but no one's finding you. Competitors rank higher. You're losing potential customers every single day.
package1.tier1_name: Order the SEO & GEO report first
package1.result: We build backlinks and work on-page and off-page. We strengthen your authority and trustworthiness (E-E-A-T) and do the technical work on your website or shop. Within 3–6 months, your site appears in the Google TOP 20 for your key phrases — and shows up in ChatGPT, Gemini, and other AI chatbots.
package2.name: VIRAL POTENTIAL
package2.problem: You know Instagram/TikTok/Facebook is a goldmine of customers, but you don't have time to create content consistently.
package2.result: Regular, professional content across social media. We pick the right channels for your business: YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X. We build a marketing plan and target content at your buyer persona. Want to learn? We'll train you. Prefer to hand it over? We've got it. We grow your brand recognition and open up new sales channels.
package3.name: AUTOPILOT
package3.problem: You're spending hours on tasks a machine could handle. Your time is too valuable for that.
package3.result: We automate: document workflows, form filling, reports, customer service, lead generation, and work organisation. Custom software and workflows — with or without AI. Save 10–20 hours a week. Your system works for you 24/7.
website.title: Need a website or online store?
website.subtitle: We handle that too
package4.name: FULL VIP
package4.description: SEO & GEO + Social Media + Automation + Support. For businesses that want to hand off their entire marketing and focus on what matters most — their clients.
package4.li4: Access to us 12 hours a day, 6 days a week
cta.title: So — shall we begin?
cta.subtitle: Your next chapter starts here.
cta.desc: Choose one of our packages: SEO, Social Media, automation, or everything together in FULL VIP. We're here to support you every step of the way — no pressure, just results.
contact.title: Ready to take the first step?
contact.subtitle: Write, call, or drop us a message — we reply within 48h.
form.rodo_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data in accordance with GDPR for the purpose of responding to my enquiry.
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. Give us a moment to prepare the perfect solution for you. We'll be in touch within 48h.
footer.description: "We build marketing that sets you free"
footer.copyright: © 2026 POMELO Marketing and Soft. All rights reserved.
cookie.text: We use cookies essential for the site to function and — with your consent — analytics cookies (Google Analytics 4) to analyse traffic and improve our services. Learn more in our Cookie Policy and Privacy Policy.
cookie.necessary_desc: Required for the site to function correctly: language selection, form session, security.
cookie.analytics_desc: Collect anonymous visitor statistics. They help us improve the site. Data is pseudonymised and stored for 14 months.
